description: Learn about building a globally distributed serverless application with Amazon CloudFront, Lambda@Edge, and Amazon DynamoDB Global Tables. Charles from Pernod Ricard explains how the company built a low-latency URL shortener service that’s used every time a consumer scans the QR code of a beverage bottle produced by Pernod Ricard Group.
fulltitle: Pernod Ricard: Shortening URLs on a Global Scale with Low Latency (French)
